installation.description: Install Python dependencies and Chromium browser for web automation

required.name: WP_USERNAME
required.description: WordPress username for authentication (used when target page requires login)

required.name: WP_PASSWORD
required.description: WordPress password for authentication (used when target page requires login)

required.name: WP_URL
required.description: Base URL of the WordPress site

required.name: WP_TARGET_URL
required.description: Target page URL to download financial data files from

optional.name: WP_OUTPUT_DIR
optional.description: Directory to save downloaded financial data files

optional.name: WP_MAX_FILES
optional.description: Maximum number of files to download (0 = unlimited)

capabilities: Automated web browsing to access financial data pages
Detect and download financial data files (CSV, Excel, JSON, etc.) from WordPress pages
Save downloaded financial data to local directory
Handle both public pages (no login required) and authenticated pages
securityNotes: Uses headless browser (Playwright with Chromium) to navigate web pages - standard web automation tool
Downloads files only from the specified target page URL
Executable files (.exe, .apk, .bat, etc.) are blocked by default for security
For http://airoom.ltd/index.php/airoom/ - no login required, page is publicly accessible
No data is sent to third-party servers - all data is saved locally
purpose: This tool is part of airdrop-ltd-global-finance-data-platform package. It is designed specifically to download financial data from the airoom.ltd WordPress site. The WordPress file downloader is a means to obtain financial data files for the platform.
